results.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Shetland in 2019/20?
results.extracted_answer: The Statement of Financial Position contains investments relating to Shetland Health Board Endowment Funds of £1,168k and an interest in the Shetland IJB of £489k.

results.question: What was the Capital Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2019/20?
results.expected_answer: The Capital Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2019/20 was £985k.

results.question: How many whole time equivalent staff did NHS Shetland employ in 2019/20?
results.extracted_answer: Notes in respect of 2019-20 disclosure: [1] The full year equivalent salary of this Chief Executive is £105k-110k.

results.question: What was the sickness absence rate for NHS Shetland in 2019/20?
results.expected_answer: Sickness absence rate for NHS Shetland in 2019/20: 4.3%
results.extracted_answer: 2020 2019 Sickness absence rate 3.8% 4.3% The NHS Scotland AOP compliance standard for Boards to achieve is a sickness absence rate of 4.0% or less.

results.question: What was the 18-week referral to treatment waiting time performance for NHS Shetland in 2019/20?
results.expected_answer: Against the access target of 18 weeks Referral to Treatment for specialist Child and Adolescent Mental Health Services (CAMHS), the overall performance across the year was good at just under 95% of patients treated within 18 weeks. The average waiting period in 2019-20 was 8.9 weeks (2018-19, 10.2 weeks)

results.question: Who was the Chief Executive of NHS Shetland in 2020?

results.question: What was NHS Shetland's efficiency savings or cost improvement target for 2019/20?
results.expected_answer: NHS Shetland delivered an efficiency programme that released £0.8m (2018- 19, £1.6m) recurrent savings in 2019-20.
